items.title: Solana’s network is booming – So why is SOL still stuck below $88?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite Solana's network growth, SOL's price remains below $88, indicating potential market skepticism or external pressures affecting investor confidence.

items.title: North Korea blames ‘reptile media’ over reports of crypto theft
items.whyYouShouldCare: North Korea's denial of crypto theft allegations highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions that may impact crypto market perceptions and regulatory scrutiny.

items.title: US law firm attempts to block transfer of frozen ETH from Kelp exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The legal efforts to block the transfer of frozen ETH from the Kelp exploit could influence investor sentiment regarding security and trust in DeFi protocols.
